meta.title: Carrier Bridge — AI carrier sourcing & rate-sheet comparator
meta.description: Identify the right carriers out of 100,000 European operators and normalise their rate sheets — parcel, groupage, ancillary surcharges — for instant, objective comparison. Sourcing and transport pricing, powered by AI.

hero.subtitle: Our AI agent identifies the most relevant carriers out of 100,000 European operators and normalises their rate sheets — parcel, groupage, ancillary surcharges — into a single structured view, for objective side-by-side comparison.

mockup.label: Natural-language search
mockup.query: 30 ADR class 3 tankers, Italy ↔ Northern France lane

trust.label: Built for Transport Procurement and Supply Chain teams

problem.title: Carrier sourcing AND rate comparison are broken.
problem.subtitle: Procurement teams keep tendering the same carriers year after year. And when offers come back, serious comparison is impossible: every carrier has its own format, its own weight brackets, its own surcharges.

items.title: Always the same carriers
items.text: Your tenders revolve around a small circle of known operators. Without market visibility, you miss the best-fit carriers.

items.title: Unreadable, heterogeneous rate sheets
items.text: Excel, PDF, scans, proprietary formats. Every carrier has its own structure, brackets and zones. Zero native comparability.

items.title: Ancillary surcharges scattered and opaque
items.text: Fuel, appointment, tail lift, ADR, tarpaulin, tolls… Every surcharge is expressed differently. Real gaps get lost in the noise.

features.title: Sourcing and transport pricing, in one platform
features.subtitle: An AI that identifies the right carriers — and automatically normalises their rate sheets so they're finally comparable.

items.title: Natural-language search
items.text: Describe your need like you would to a colleague. The AI understands business criteria (ADR, reefer, bulk, lanes, certifications).

items.title: 100,000-carrier database
items.text: Full European coverage. Each carrier is deeply analysed from its website and public sources.

items.title: Automatic pre-qualification
items.text: Fleet, lanes, certifications, specialisations: every key criterion is extracted and structured for a reliable shortlist.

items.title: Rate-sheet normalisation
items.text: Parcel, groupage, FTL: the AI structures each carrier's Excel, PDF or scanned rate sheets into a unified schema.

items.title: Ancillary surcharges decoded
items.text: Fuel, appointment, tail lift, ADR, tarpaulin, tolls, demurrage: every surcharge is extracted, labelled and made comparable.

items.title: Multi-carrier comparator
items.text: Compare offers side by side on every bracket, zone and surcharge. The best price per line stands out instantly.

howItWorks.title: One unified flow for sourcing and comparison
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps — whether you're looking for new carriers or comparing rate sheets you've received.

steps.title: State your need or import rate sheets
steps.text: Describe your spec in natural language, or drop in the rate sheets you've received (Excel, PDF, email).

steps.title: The AI analyses, extracts and normalises
steps.text: Sourcing across 100,000 carriers and/or extraction of brackets, zones and ancillary surcharges into a unified schema.

steps.title: Get your unified view
steps.text: Qualified shortlist for sourcing, multi-carrier comparator for pricing: everything is ready to act on.

steps.title: Decide and negotiate
steps.text: Tender more broadly, arbitrate your allocations, negotiate from a factual, objective position.

agent.subtitle: You receive Excel, PDF, scanned rate sheets — each with its own brackets, zones and surcharges. The AI normalises them into a unified schema and displays them side by side. The best line pops out instantly.
bullets: Ingests parcel, groupage and FTL rate sheets in any format (Excel, PDF, scans, email)
Automatic normalisation of weight brackets, zones, departments, international destinations
Extracts ancillary surcharges: fuel, appointment, tail lift, ADR, tarpaulin, tolls, demurrage
Side-by-side comparator with the best offer highlighted per line and per surcharge

useCases.title: Designed for every transport flow
useCases.subtitle: Whatever your industry, the AI identifies qualified carriers and makes their rate sheets comparable.

items.title: Chemicals & dangerous goods
items.text: ADR classes, stainless tankers, SQAS certifications. Targeted sourcing and normalised ADR surcharges for comparison.

items.title: Food & temperature-controlled
items.text: Reefer, frozen, multi-temperature. IFS Logistics verified, appointment and tail-lift fees made comparable.

items.title: Construction & bulk
items.text: Tippers, flatbeds, solid bulk. Regional shortlists plus per-km rates and fuel surcharges side by side.

items.title: Retail & e-commerce
items.text: Full truckloads, pallets, B2B parcel. Normalised parcel rate sheets across every bracket and zone.

items.title: Industry & cross-border flows
items.text: Heavy haulage, equipment, import/export. Multi-country comparison with ancillary surcharges extracted.

faq.title: Everything you want to know
faq.subtitle: Can't find your answer? Reach out, we reply within 24 hours.

items.q: How does the AI analyse 100,000 carriers?
items.a: Our engine continuously crawls the public websites of European carriers, extracts business information (fleet, lanes, certifications, specialisations) and structures it into a semantically searchable database.

items.q: What rate-sheet formats can the AI process?
items.a: Excel, PDF (text or scanned), Word, images, email attachments. The AI handles parcel, groupage and FTL rate sheets regardless of their initial level of structuring.

items.q: How do you normalise heterogeneous ancillary surcharges?
items.a: Every surcharge (fuel, appointment, tail lift, ADR, tarpaulin, toll, etc.) is identified, reduced to a common base (%, €/shipment, €/kg…) and mapped to a unified vocabulary for true comparison.

items.q: Is the platform aimed at carriers?
items.a: No. Carrier Bridge is exclusively designed for shippers: manufacturers, distributors, traders and their Transport Procurement and Supply Chain teams.

items.q: Is my data and rate-sheet information protected?
items.a: Yes. Your queries, rate sheets, tenders and comparisons are strictly confidential. European hosting, GDPR compliance, encryption in transit and at rest.

items.q: Is it compatible with my TMS or tender tool?
items.a: Yes. Standard exports (CSV, Excel) for shortlists and comparisons, plus custom integrations (API, webhooks) with the leading TMS and ERP solutions.

contact.title: Ready to transform sourcing and rate comparison?
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your context — we'll set up a demo with your own rate sheets and your real flows.
